scope: Discord P1-P4 across naia-shell and naia-agent isolated worktrees
resolved_findings: Composite binding/guild/channel cursor identity, generation pruning, monotonic cross-channel cursor RMW under a native mutex.
No token in argv, environment, WebView, manifest, diagnostics, or durable normal settings; one-shot secret pipe and native credential capture.
Discord channel turns bypass private shared memory, compaction, and personal conversation logs.
Crash recovery discards unfinished reservations, preserves replying cursors, and releases active reservations on stop.
Inbox reads are byte/count bounded; corrupt data is quarantined; watcher events use generation-bound server-authorized local-only snapshots.
Strict versioned manifests reject unknown fields, duplicate binding IDs, and duplicate guild/channel tuples.
Gateway discovery and reply POSTs are timeout/cancel aware, opcode-1 heartbeats are answered, replies and global 429 waits are connection-serialized without permanent head-of-line blocking.
Same-session ingress is dispatched and committed in arrival order; reply caps and chunks preserve Unicode code points.
Runtime status errors are generation-bound and cleared on recovery; settings and inbox watcher events are separated.
Guild discovery paginates to the explicit product cap, reports truncation and per-guild degradation, and never treats incomplete discovery as authoritative permission loss.
Persisted channel preference hydrates only once; later inbox events are coalesced and cannot revert an in-memory selection.
Empty binding saves fail closed and do not restore an unsafe prior manifest after restart failure.

automated_evidence.agent: 99 files passed, 3 skipped; 1204 tests passed, 9 skipped; TypeScript passed
automated_evidence.shell_ui: 117 files passed, 2 skipped; 1290 tests passed, 13 skipped
automated_evidence.root_build: known baseline TypeScript rootDir/import-extension failure in playwright-port-config.contract.test.ts; emitted core dist was used only for package verification and removed afterward

external_acceptance_pending: Operator-backed live Discord bot reconnect, permission-loss, and reply acceptance.
Real operating-system credential capture, rotate, remove, and restart acceptance.
